candidate_summary: Tswana kgotla council assembly-inspired K-agent consensus: open-speak inclusion-by-default + chair-LLM go-tshwaraganya wrap-up synthesis + mmualebe weak-voice preservation regularizer + acacia-tree shared-context buffer + anti-polarization output-divergence penalty.
content_words: tswana kgotla botswana chief kgosi assembly
open-speak inclusion-by-default O_open K agents at least one message per round no routing silence
chair-LLM K_chair wrap-up synthesis go-tshwaraganya multi-view weighted union final decision
mmualebe weak-voice preservation L_mmu regularizer boost low-confidence low-fluency contributions
acacia-tree fixed-context shared-space equal-access + anti-polarization output-divergence penalty top-2

results.name: CONSENSAGENT Efficient Consensus Multi-Agent LLM
results.rationale: Consensus multi-agent shares generic consensus theme but no kgotla/mmualebe/chair-wrap-up/open-speak-by-default/weak-voice regularizer mechanisms.

results.name: Multi-Agent Debate Judges Adaptive Stability
results.rationale: Debate/judge framework differs from inclusion-by-default open-speak + chair wrap-up synthesis; lacks weak-voice regularizer and acacia-tree shared buffer.

results.name: Multi-Agent Collaboration Mechanisms Survey
results.rationale: Survey covers collaboration mechanisms broadly but no Tswana/kgotla framing, no open-speak inclusion default, no chair-LLM wrap-up synthesis specific mechanism, no L_mmu weak-voice regularizer.

results.name: Agentic LLMs Supply Chain Consensus
results.rationale: Supply-chain domain-specific consensus; lacks kgotla inclusion-by-default, weak-voice preservation, anti-polarization penalty.

results.name: Mitigating LLM Hallucinations Multi-Agent
results.rationale: Focuses on hallucination mitigation, not consensus assembly with chair wrap-up or open-speak inclusion.

results.name: LLM Multi-Agents Survey IJCAI 2024
results.rationale: General survey index; no specific kgotla council, no chair-LLM wrap-up go-tshwaraganya synthesis, no weak-voice L_mmu regularizer.

results.name: RAG-to-Multi-Agent Survey
results.rationale: RAG-to-multi-agent transition survey; no consensus assembly with inclusion-by-default open-speak, no chair wrap-up synthesis mechanism.

results.name: Multi-Agent Multi-LLM Architecture Guide
results.rationale: General architecture guide; no kgotla/mmualebe/chair-LLM wrap-up + weak-voice regularizer + acacia-tree shared buffer + anti-polarization penalty composite mechanism.

decision_rationale: None of the 8 results meet any threshold. Existing literature covers generic consensus, debate, collaboration surveys, hallucination mitigation, architecture guides, but none specify the composite kgotla-inspired mechanism. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.92 / func 0.74-0.92 on CONSENSAGENT + Collaboration-Survey + Debate-Stability adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
